title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Noise! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Noise:
Noise is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
